text: Upon entering this dim and empty hallway, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation, as though I am about to uncover a hidden layer of reality. The sterile atmosphere and industrial details evoke both curiosity and a subtle unease. Walking further and encountering the 'R + D' space, my feelings shift. The vibrant wall and the interplay between technology and human thought on display spark contemplation. Here, I am reminded of the ongoing dialogue between ourselves and the machines we create—an endless dance of learning, adapting, and coexisting. I feel introspective, eager to explore, but also aware of the silent questions about progress and our place in an ever-evolving world.
